# llms.txt - AI/LLM Discovery File
# ToolForge - Free Online Tools Platform

title: ToolForge
description: A collection of free, fast, browser-based tools built for SEO performance and ad revenue. No backend required. No sign-up. No data leaves your browser.
url: https://www.toolforge.website
license: MIT
author: ToolForge

# Tools available
tools:
  - name: Image Compressor
    url: https://www.toolforge.website/tools/image-compressor
    description: Compress images online free without losing quality

  - name: QR Code Generator
    url: https://www.toolforge.website/tools/qr-generator
    description: Generate QR codes online free for URLs, text, and more

  - name: JSON Formatter
    url: https://www.toolforge.website/tools/json-formatter
    description: Format and beautify JSON data online

  - name: Password Generator
    url: https://www.toolforge.website/tools/password-generator
    description: Generate strong, secure passwords online

  - name: Base64 Encoder
    url: https://www.toolforge.website/tools/base64-encoder
    description: Encode and decode Base64 text online

  - name: Word Counter
    url: https://www.toolforge.website/tools/word-counter
    description: Count words, characters, and sentences online

  - name: Color Palette
    url: https://www.toolforge.website/tools/color-palette
    description: Extract color palettes from images online

  - name: UUID Generator
    url: https://www.toolforge.website/tools/uuid-generator
    description: Generate UUIDs and GUIDs online

  - name: Image Resizer
    url: https://www.toolforge.website/tools/image-resizer
    description: Resize images online free to any dimension

  - name: Image Cropper
    url: https://www.toolforge.website/tools/image-cropper
    description: Crop images online free with precision

# API endpoints (if any)
api:
  - url: https://www.toolforge.website/api
    description: ToolForge API endpoints
